chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1389 of 2017 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders as to maintainability of petition. 11.04.2025 Ch. Atif Rafiq, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Aqeel Qureshi, advocate for the respondent. Mr. Muhammad Ahmed, Assistant Attorney General. Learned counsel submits under instructions that notices impugned shall be contested before the issuing authority. He seeks that same be adjudicated vide speaking order after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner and pending aforesaid no coercive action be taken there against. Learned counsel for the respondent articulates no cavil to the aforesaid and states that petition may be disposed of in the above terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
